changes.summary: Trade submissions now work for all league owners, not just the commissioner — the MFL authentication cookie was being silently stripped during cross-origin redirects, causing every trade proposal to fail
Trade Builder page and My Trades panel now use the site-wide editorial design system — consistent section titles, design tokens, typography scale, and focus states across all trade builder components
League Summary page now uses the site-wide design token system — consistent colors, typography, spacing, and improved accessibility with keyboard-navigable sorting and screen reader announcements
